items.title: South Africa's long-serving former defence minister and former Robben Island prisoner dies
items.dek: Mosiuoa Lekota was imprisoned with former South African President Nelson Mandela on Robben Island.
items.body: Mosiuoa Lekota was imprisoned with former South African President Nelson Mandela on Robben Island.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Spain's Pedro Sánchez hits back at Trump threat to sever trade saying 'no to war'
items.dek: Spain's prime minister delivers a strong rebuttal to US President Donald Trump's threat to end trade with his country.
items.body: Spain's prime minister delivers a strong rebuttal to US President Donald Trump's threat to end trade with his country.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Why did US and Israel attack Iran and how long could the war last?
items.dek: Iran has carried out strikes against Israel, across the Gulf and against a British base in Cyprus in retaliation.
items.body: Iran has carried out strikes against Israel, across the Gulf and against a British base in Cyprus in retaliation.
